memoryArtifacts.headline: Family of Herbert from Annals and Antiquities, vol. II, pg. 776-777
memoryArtifacts.description: Family of Herbert from Annuals and Antiquities, vol. II, pg. 776-777. However, it is noted, that Herbert of Vermandois (Herbertus Camerarius) was not the Count of Vermandois, but rather his uncle was, Herbert IV, Count of Vermandois. It is also noted that the son of Herbertus Camerarius, Henry FitzHerbert (Henry the Treasurer) is missing from the Annals and Antiquities, but his grandson Herbert (Herbert FitzHenry) and great grandson Herbert  (Herbert FitzHerbert) are included.

zh.lifeSummary: 當Christian verch Gwarin Ddu於1277年出生在英國威爾斯蒙姆爾時，她的父親Gwarin Ddu Ab Lorwerth The Black Lord42歲，母親Mrs. Gwarin ab Iorwerth46歲。她於1300年與Adam FitzHerbert, Lord of Llanllowell在英國賀特福爾賀特福德結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她於1301年住在威爾士蒙姆爾武斯可。她去世於1365年在威爾士享年88歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Christian verch Gwarin Ddu于1277年出生在英国威尔斯蒙姆爾时，她的父亲Gwarin Ddu Ab Lorwerth The Black Lord42岁，母亲Mrs. Gwarin ab Iorwerth46岁。她于1300年与Adam FitzHerbert, Lord of Llanllowell在英国賀特福爾賀特福德结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她于1301年住在威尔士蒙姆爾武斯可。她去世于1365年在威尔士享年88岁。

nameMeanings.name: Christian
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Latin Christianus ‘follower of Christ’, in use as a given name from the Middle Ages onwards, especially as a girl's name. The name of Christ (Greek Khristos) is a translation of the Hebrew term Messiah ‘anointed’.

variants.name: Christianne
meanings: From Latin Christianus ‘follower of Christ’, in use as a given name from the Middle Ages onwards, especially as a girl's name. The name of Christ (Greek Khristos) is a translation of the Hebrew term Messiah ‘anointed’.

nameMeanings.name: verch
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Otto, Orlo.

variants.name: Ferch
meanings: German: variant of   Ferg  . Compare   Verch  .
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förtsch (see Foertsch ).
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förch (see Foerch ).

nameMeanings.name: Gwarin
meanings: An old name. The same as Waring or Guerin, who came over with the Conqueror; a name probably connected with that of the Waernas or Wernas. the Varini or Verini, a people of the Elbe

nameMeanings.name: Ddu
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 竇, meaning ‘hole’ in ancient Chinese: (i) adopted as a surname by Yue Zhu and Yue Long, two sons of Shao Kang, the sixth king of the Xia dynasty (2070–1600  BC ). Yue Zhu and Yue Long are said to have adopted Dou (竇) (meaning ‘hole’) as a surname because their pregnant grandmother had escaped from a rebellion through a hole in the wall before giving birth to their father, Shao Kang, who later recaptured the throne. (ii) traced back to the Dou (竇) family from the Di ethnic group and some other families from the Xianbei ethnic group in ancient China.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 豆, denoting an ancient stemmed cup of bowl: (i) traced back to some inhabitants in the state of Chu during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ). (ii) adopted as the surname by the Chi Xiao Dou (赤小豆) and Dou Lu (豆盧) family from the Xianbei ethnic group in northern China during the Northern Wei dynasty (386–534  AD ).

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 鈄, referring to a type of ancient vessel for drinking wine: said to be borne by the descendants of the Duke Kang of Qi (died 379  BC ), who was ousted from his throne in the state of Qi and sent into exile. It was said that he was forced to use the vessel Dou (鈄) to cook food during his exile, and some of his descendants inherited Dou as the surname to memorize this period.

en.lifeSummary: When Christian verch Gwarin Ddu was born in 1277, in Monmouthshire, Wales, United Kingdom, her father, Gwarin Ddu Ab Lorwerth The Black Lord, was 42 and her mother, Mrs. Gwarin ab Iorwerth, was 46. She married Adam FitzHerbert, Lord of Llanllowell in 1300, in Hertford, Hertfordshire, England. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 1 daughter. She lived in Usk, Monmouthshire, Wales in 1301. She died in 1365, in Wales, at the age of 88.

fr.Wernddu, Wales: Rhondda, Glamorgan, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Christian verch Gwarin Ddu est née en 1277, à Monmouthshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, son père, Gwarin Ddu Ab Lorwerth The Black Lord, avait 42 ans et sa mère, Mrs. Gwarin ab Iorwerth, avait 46 ans. Elle a épousé Adam FitzHerbert, Lord of Llanllowell en 1300, à Hertford, Hertfordshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 1 fille. Elle a vécu à Usk, Monmouthshire, Galles en 1301. Elle est décédée en 1365, à Galles, à l’âge de 88 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Christian verch Gwarin Ddu 1277 in Monmouthshire, Wales, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Gwarin Ddu Ab Lorwerth The Black Lord 42 und ihre Mutter Mrs. Gwarin ab Iorwerth 46. Sie hat 1300 in Hertford, Hertfordshire, England Adam FitzHerbert, Lord of Llanllowell geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 1 Tochter. 1301 hat sie in Usk, Monmouthshire, Wales gelebt. Sie starb 1365 im Alter von 88 Jahren in Wales.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Christian verch Gwarin Ddu è nata il nel 1277 nel Monmouthshire, Galles, Regno Unito, sua padre, Gwarin Ddu Ab Lorwerth The Black Lord, aveva 42 anni e sua madre, Mrs. Gwarin ab Iorwerth, aveva 46 anni. Lei sposato Adam FitzHerbert, Lord of Llanllowell nel 1300, nel Hertford, Hertfordshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 1 figlia. Vissuto a Usk, Monmouthshire, Galles nel 1301. Morì nel 1365, nel Galles, all'età di 88 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Christian verch Gwarin Dduが1277年にイギリスウェールズモンモウスシュアイアで生まれた時，父Gwarin Ddu Ab Lorwerth The Black Lordは42歳，母Mrs. Gwarin ab Iorwerthは46歳であった。1300年にイギリスハートフォードシュアイアハートフォードでAdam FitzHerbert, Lord of Llanllowellと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1301年にはウェールズモンモウスシュアイアウスクに住んでいた。彼女は1365年にウェールズで88歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Christian verch Gwarin Ddu(이)가 1277년 영국 웨일스 몬모우스실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Gwarin Ddu Ab Lorwerth The Black Lord(은)는 42세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mrs. Gwarin ab Iorwerth(은)는 46세였다. 그녀는 1300년 영국 허트퍼드실르 허트퍼드에서 Adam FitzHerbert, Lord of Llanllowell(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 1301년도에 웨일스 몬모우스실르 스크에서 살았다. 그녀는 1365년 웨일스에서 88세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Christian verch Gwarin Ddu nasceu em 1277, em Monmouthshire, Gales, United Kingdom, seu pai, Gwarin Ddu Ab Lorwerth The Black Lord, tinha 42 anos e sua mãe, Mrs. Gwarin ab Iorwerth, tinha 46 anos. Ela casou-se com Adam FitzHerbert, Lord of Llanllowell em 1300, em Hertford, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 1 filha. Ela viveu em Usk, Monmouthshire, Gales em 1301. Ela faleceu em 1365, em Gales, com 88 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Christian verch Gwarin Ddu родилась в 1277 г. в местности монмоутшир, Уэльс, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Gwarin Ddu Ab Lorwerth The Black Lord было 42 года, а матери, которую звали Mrs. Gwarin ab Iorwerth, 46. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Adam FitzHerbert, Lord of Llanllowell в 1300 г. в местности хиртфорд, хиртфордшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 1 дочь. Она жила в местности уск, монмоутшир, Уэльс в 1301 году. Она умерла в 1365 г. в местности Уэльс в возрасте 88 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Christian verch Gwarin Ddu nació en 1277, en Monmouthshire, Gales, Reino Unido, su papá, Gwarin Ddu Ab Lorwerth The Black Lord, tenía 42 años y su mamá, Mrs. Gwarin ab Iorwerth, tenía 46 años. Se casó con Adam FitzHerbert, Lord of Llanllowell en 1300, en Hertford, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 1 hija. Vivió en Usk, Monmouthshire, Gales en 1301. Murió en 1365, en Gales, a la edad de 88 años.
